posts.author: Mayank_Jham
posts.community: Freshara Agro Exports Ltd - 3rd Largest Gherkins Exporter from India
posts.text: Buying at desired entry price is a challenge in SME and especially in these type of low float stocks where the volumes are low and on days where market movements are extreme, these stocks trade in upper/lower circuit I would say it doesnt really matter if you buy ± 15% as in opportunities like these as you are chasing a very high upside and story of doubling of revenues and also the margin of safety does not change much at 12x PE or 15X PE The story is yet to play out as the core theises is on the performance of the acquired subsidiary and its intergartion of operations with the Indian product…

posts.author: gaurav
posts.community: Freshara Agro Exports Ltd - 3rd Largest Gherkins Exporter from India
posts.text: Stock did not hit my entry price and I was forced to buy later. How does others deal with entry price fixation? They have been granted a subsidy of 4.2 cr via PMKSY which will fuel the unit 2 (Ambur) expansion. I see no respite to rupee depreciation and it may cross 100 in this financial year. They have govt support (subsidy, FTAs), currency depreciation (export oriented), good promoter (subjective), expansion plans (>2x revenue target), backward integration and margin expansion (underway with spanish acquisition).
